items.caption: An antique iron cannon, possibly from the early 1900s, rests on a wooden floor, serving as a doorstop. The cannon's metal body shows signs of age and use, with visible rust and a slightly curved shape. The cannon's handle is on the right side, and there is a visible brand or model name on the front. The cannon's design suggests it could be a heavy piece, likely used for industrial or military purposes. The wooden floor provides a rustic backdrop, enhancing the vintage feel of the image.
